nasb.text: Also to his son Shemaiah sons were born who ruled over the house of their father, for they were mighty men of valor.

esv.text: Also to his son Shemaiah were sons born who were rulers in their fathers’ houses, for they were men of great ability.

cnv.text: 他的兒子示瑪雅也生了幾個兒子，都是管治他們的家族的，因為他們都是英勇的戰士。

ccb.text: 他儿子示玛雅有几个儿子都很能干，在各自的家族中做首领。
